phonetic: 藞瑟nv蓽藧te瑟z; 瑟n藞v蓽藧t-
examples: This paper introduces the method of invertase extraction of from yeast.
Sequence analysis showed the amplified fragment was the TIV1 fragment of the vacuolar invertase gene.
The effects of 1, 3-dichloropropene on the activities of soil urease and invertase were studied in lab.
